settings.title: The Office Calm Kit
settings.description: A quick desk-friendly ritual. Perfect for a mindful break from screen time. Includes a compact kit with hoop, thread, and tutorial access.

settings.title: The Team Thank-You Box
settings.description: Premium branded gifting with a story. A beautiful Sujni ritual kit in a gift box — personalised with your brand or a custom message.

settings.title: The Bridal Ritual Box
settings.description: For pre-wedding zen moments. A luxurious bridesmaid experience — each guest stitches their own keepsake together.
